---
title: "Life Quality Index for Reconquista Basin"
description: "descripcionsarasa"
date: "2019-01-02"
categories: [QGIS, Cartography, SOTM Latam]
image: "images/img1.jpeg"  # Crucial for the Grid look!
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true # Nice touch: hides code until user clicks "Show Code"
---

(Your text, maps, and code go here...)

[Your text and maps go here...]
